---
title: "Foxmir Blog"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: latest-listing
    contents: publish
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 5
  - id: life-listing
    contents: publish/Life
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: test4folder-listing
    contents: publish/test4Folder
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED-HOMEPAGE: edit folders/posts in Obsidian, not this file. -->

Writing about tools, code, and everyday life.

A small archive of notes, experiments, and everyday observations.

<section class="home-section">
<h2 class="home-section-heading">Latest</h2>

:::{#latest-listing}
:::
</section>

<section class="home-section">
<h2 class="home-section-heading">Life</h2>

:::{#life-listing}
:::
</section>

<section class="home-section">
<h2 class="home-section-heading">test4Folder</h2>

:::{#test4folder-listing}
:::
</section>
